Summary: M6 — Real product integration / sellable restaurant demo
Description: Epic for the M6 post-plan track (candidate D-030, advisory; see docs/M6_REAL_PRODUCT_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md). Connect the M5 demo UIs to the already-built backend (RF-014 to RF-094) by implementing the stub feature/auth packages, plus a fenced set of change-controlled new backend surfaces (menu, image storage, provisioning, tables, kitchen action). Frozen invariants remain binding; new backend amends the baseline and follows the architecture-change procedure. Connect, do not rebuild.
Epic Name: M6 Real product integration / sellable restaurant demo

Summary: Formalize M6 direction and Jira backlog
Description: Docs-only governance gate. Create the M6 direction plan, this human-readable backlog, and the Jira CSV, and record candidate decision D-030 inside the direction plan (not ratified into DECISIONS.md). No code, backend, or frozen-doc changes. Acceptance: M6 docs exist and are approved; D-030 recorded as candidate.

Implement packages/auth_identity and a shared Supabase-client bootstrap so each app gets a real session and routes by role: manager/owner email+MFA; cashier/kitchen device-pair + PIN. Reuses RF-050/051/059; no new schema. Acceptance: a real PIN/login yields pin_session_id + device_id + resolved org/restaurant/branch/role; RLS-scoped reads work; no service-role key in client.

Summary: Menu backend schema RLS RPC and sync
Description: NEW BACKEND (change-controlled). Add menu_categories/menu_items/item_sizes/item_variants/modifiers/modifier_options tables with RLS, audited management RPCs, and menu entities in sync_pull. Prices integer-minor; order snapshots stay authoritative (D-008). Acceptance: RLS-isolated menu CRUD via RPC; menu pulls to device; isolation suite green.

Summary: Menu image storage bucket and policies
Description: NEW BACKEND (change-controlled). Add a tenant-scoped Supabase Storage bucket with org-path RLS policies and a signed-URL/upload path for menu images. Acceptance: org-scoped upload/serve; org A cannot read/write org B; MIME/size limits enforced; no public PII.

Owner edits the menu: category/item/price/availability/size/variant/modifier CRUD plus image upload, in feature_menu. Consumes RF-109 RPCs and RF-110 storage. Prices integer-minor (no float). Acceptance: owner CRUD persists to backend and syncs to POS.

Summary: Settings users roles and device provisioning backend
Description: NEW BACKEND (change-controlled). Add RPCs for grant_membership/update_role, pair_device/approve_device, and update restaurant/branch settings, with RLS; reuse RF-061 revoke. Every mutation audited. Acceptance: owner manages users/roles/devices/settings, all audited and RLS-isolated; no cross-tenant or privilege escalation; isolation suite green.

Summary: Owner settings users and devices UI
Description: Owner admin surface for restaurant/branch settings, user list + role assignment, and device pairing, over RF-112 RPCs. Acceptance: end-to-end manage users/devices/settings against the backend, role-gated.

Summary: Tables order type and table assignment
Description: SMALL NEW BACKEND (change-controlled, or deferred local-first). POS order-type toggle (dine-in/takeaway); dine-in picks a table from a branch list. Add a small tables table + RLS (orders.table_id already exists); reuse domain TableAssignmentService. Acceptance: order carries order-type + table; one open dine-in per table.

Summary: POS real submit-order and client outbox push
Description: POS uses real menu and submits orders offline-first: implement feature_orders client and a client outbox push engine (retry/backoff/conflict over data_local outbox + data_remote transport, mirroring KdsSyncCoordinator) over submit_order (RF-052) and sync_push (RF-056). Idempotency device_id+local_operation_id (D-022); server recomputes totals (D-007). Acceptance: an order submitted offline applies exactly once on reconnect; totals server-validated; options snapshotted (D-008).

Summary: POS cash payment shift and receipt flow
Description: POS cash payment + shift + receipt: implement feature_payments and feature_shifts over record_payment (RF-054) and open/close/reconcile_shift (RF-055); build the receipt via the printing package. Integer change math; receipt number authoritative on sync; void blocked if paid (D-024); pay-first independence (D-025). Acceptance: cash payment completes; shift variance computed.

Summary: KDS live backend orders and kitchen status actions
Description: SMALL NEW BACKEND (change-controlled). KDS shows real submitted orders by station and staff Acknowledge/Start/Mark-ready/Bump/Recall via a small new kitchen status-transition RPC; reuse sync_pull/realtime (RF-057/058) and KdsSyncCoordinator. Money-free (RLS redaction); polling is source of truth (D-010). Acceptance: a POS order appears on KDS within the poll interval and advances via the backend; no money visible.

Summary: Receipt and kitchen-ticket browser print preview
Description: Browser print preview (no hardware): Print receipt / Print kitchen ticket opens a clean HTML/PDF preview via window.print, reusing the printing builders and a thin web renderer; keep the ESC/POS path intact for future native. Kitchen ticket money-free; receipt integer-money; ar/he/en RTL. Acceptance: a styled receipt/ticket prints from the browser; doc states hardware/local-bridge is future.

Dashboard reads real KPIs/daily-summary/sales-by-branch from daily_branch_sales_report and dashboard_* views (RF-075/092), RLS-scoped to the owner's branches, via a feature_reporting read client. Integer aggregation; single-currency grouping. Acceptance: dashboard numbers reconcile to real orders/payments.

apps/admin shows the platform-admin org overview (RF-091) over the separate audited path, MFA-gated and reason-logged. Platform admin is separate from tenant roles (D-026). Acceptance: a platform admin sees the cross-org overview; tenant users cannot; access is audited.

Summary: M6 final QA isolation run guide and hardening
Description: Ship-ready connected demo: write docs/M6_DEMO_RUN_GUIDE.md, harden the apps, and re-run the RF-060 isolation suite plus the new pgTAP from RF-109/110/112/114/117. Validate full workspace tests + guards + web builds + the canonical isolation set (cross-org, cashier-cannot-void-paid, KDS-no-money, revoked-device, removed-employee, platform-admin-audited). Acceptance: end-to-end demo passes; isolation tests green; run guide accurate.
